title: Microsoft Xbox negotiates closure of several studios and changes its leadership
summary: The company evaluates closing Double Fine, Ninja Theory and Compulsion Games, amid the resignation of the head of Xbox Game Studios and other senior executives.

title: Electronic Arts launches platform to integrate ads directly into video games
summary: EA Advertising will allow brands to place advertising within gameplay, which has sparked controversy among players.

title: Steam Next Fest June 2026 offers over 4000 free demos
summary: Valve's event allows testing hundreds of games, and critics highlight the most promising titles.

title: The Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake was the most viewed of Summer Game Fest
summary: Nintendo Direct was the most followed showcase and the trailer for the Ocarina of Time remake captured the attention of the event.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its final update with new story and improvements for Switch 2
summary: Patch 1.1.11 adds a new mission and an endgame feature, as well as optimizations for the hybrid console.

title: Capcom removes microtransactions from Dragon's Dogma 2 after two years of criticism
summary: The decision includes removing integrated purchases and simplifying the role-playing game editions.

title: Overwatch introduces Shion, a new hero inspired by John Wick and Devil May Cry
summary: Season 3 includes this fighter with combo abilities, new skins and a battle pass.

title: Dead by Daylight celebrates its tenth anniversary with Scooby-Doo, visual improvements and mod support
summary: Behaviour Interactive announces a collaboration with Scooby-Doo, a graphical overhaul and tools for modders.

title: United Kingdom bans social media and streaming for minors under 16, including gaming services
summary: The law restricts minors' access to digital platforms, although it excludes multiplayer from video games.

title: Ultimate Marvel vs. Capcom 3 receives an unexpected patch on Steam that unbalances the game
summary: The update, the first in almost a decade, breaks a top-tier character, altering the competition.

title: The entire Final Fantasy saga is on sale on Steam, including FF7 Remake and Rebirth
summary: Square Enix applies substantial discounts on the franchise, allowing to purchase classic and modern games at low price.

title: Blizzard sues a private World of Warcraft server for massive copyright infringement
summary: The company accuses the unofficial server of illegally generating millions of dollars with WoW content.

title: Treyarch director Mark Gordon leaves the studio after a decade
summary: The departure of the veteran executive occurs at a time of restructuring for the Call of Duty developer.

title: Nintendo launches system update 22.5.0 for Switch and Switch 2
summary: The new firmware version is now available with fixes and performance improvements.

title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella wants Xbox to be more profitable and better monetize its games
summary: Nadella points out that the company's video games are not sufficiently monetized, amid restructuring plans.

title: Hackers claim to have stolen Nintendo data and demand a ransom of $2 million
summary: The group threatens to leak confidential information if Nintendo does not pay the ransom.

title: A 'sacred' copy of Super Mario Bros. is auctioned for $3 million
summary: The copy of the NES classic reaches a record price, considered an invaluable collector's item.

title: Donald Trump uses Persona 5 to spread political propaganda
summary: The former US president publishes a video with the game's aesthetic, which is about fighting corrupt politicians, generating criticism.

title: A lost Dragon Ball Z RPG resurfaces after being published in a forgotten forum
summary: A user shares an unreleased role-playing game of Dragon Ball Z, discovered in a forum thread from seven years ago.

title: Former employee reveals that Bungie was on the verge of closing before being bought by Sony
summary: A former worker claims that the Destiny studio faced serious financial problems and was on the brink of collapse.
